candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: In the figure, if the nuclei were contained within the stalks of Acetabularia, what types of caps would you expect from graft A?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 在$\ce{<image 1>}$中,如果细胞核包含在髋臼茎内,则您对移植物的期望寿命会有何影响?
metadata.explanation_zh: 解释简洁准确。由于海生绿藻(Acetabularia mediterranea)的足部含有细胞核,因此含有足部的移植体就能再生出整个生物体,包括帽状部分。无需改进。
